2200: Lightship abm, took departure course WNW1/2N
He says, Stockholm, but the distance from his 0800 Lat/Long is 10 miles too far.
Also, he anchors in 11 falthoms of water. The position I used for "Stockholm" is the correct distance from
the 0800 position, and is the closest water of this depth to Stockholm.

People: 1030: By order of Commanding Officer all persons holding rates under him were disrated. At 1105 Called all hands to muster.Captain Bancroft Gherardi read orders of the Navy department of Oct 30th detaching him from this ship on the reporting of Captain E.E. Potter, and the orders of Captain Potter to this vessel, and did then and there turn over to captain E.E. Potter to this vessel. All persons disrated this day by order of Captain Gherardi are rerated by order of Captain Potter.
